sections.paragraph:
Ὀλυμπᾶς, ᾶ, ὁ (IG III 1080, 28.—CIL XIV 1286. Etym. uncertain, but s. W-S. §16, 9; Rouffiac 91) Olympas, recipient of a greeting Ro 16:15. The vv.ll. Ὀλυμπίδα and Olympiadem are prob. due to a Latin copyist’s error.—LGPN I. M-M.

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

CIL CIL = Corpus Inscriptionum Latinarum—List 3

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

Rouffiac Rouffiac = JR., Recherches sur les caractères du Grec dans le NT d’après les inscriptions de Priène—List 3

vv.ll. vv.ll. = variae lectiones (variant readings)

prob. prob. = probable, probably

LGPN LGPN = A Lexicon of Greek Personal Names—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 704
